titleStmt.title: SII 17.545: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 545. (A.R. No. 503 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This seems to record the ūr-niyōgam, given by the residents of Rājēndraśiṅgapaṭṭiṉam, regarding a gift of land for certain services and offerings and the contribution of a fish as kārttigai-ppachchai, in the temple of the Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār by the members of a body called the Paramamāmuṉi Eḻunūṟṟuvar, who claim to be the descendants of the sage born of the fire that burnt Kāma (i.e., Manmatha).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu
cirārumalaṟkamalat ticaimukaṉun tirumālum Ārālum Aṟivariyā A
runtavattoṉ yokaḻippa vekuṇṭeḻunta karuppu villi kāma
ṉ viḻat tiruneṟṟiyil tirukkāppu nikki viḻitta taḻal Orumuṉiyā yuyarmuṉivaṉ paṉiccaṭaimuṭip paramamāmuṉi maṭiyiṟ toṟṟiya parama
māmuṉi Eḻunūṟṟuvarom Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉār Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyār tirumaṭai viḷākattu vaṭa
pāṟkellai kaṇṭaṉ periyāṉ vāykkāl niroṭiṉa ner kiḻak luṟa Itaṉ teṉpāṟkellai toṇṭamā
ṉ pūṇṭikku vaṭakkum Itaṉ merpāṟkellai Appaṉ kuḷamum Araiyaṉ Aṟu kku ner meṟkuṅ kiḻa ṟṟu Eṅkaḷ kaṭaṟkāṇiyāṉa tevar
Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyār cipātaṉ tāṅkun tirukkaṇ Uṭaiyar pala vilai koṇ ttuttaṭ pattukku mutal Āṭṭaikku
Oṉṟukku kācu 2 10 Irupatu kācum tirukkāttikaipaccaik koru miṉum Ippaṭiyāka ṉṟu I
ṟkoṭiyāṉ Irācentiraciṅkapaṭṭiṉattu Ūravarom Ip
paṭi cammatittu Ūr niyokam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ivvūṟku
ccamaintu . Ippaṭikku Ivai ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṅkalam pera
raiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ūrkkaṇakku nūṇūruṭaiyāṉ Aravāparaṇaṉ tiru maṟaikkāṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu:—
Digital edition of SII 17.545 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
